title: VPN authentication burst followed by success from unfamiliar geography
summary: Seven failed VPN SAML attempts from contiguous US addresses within 20 minutes, followed by a successful VPN login from Romania for the same account.
recommended_actions: Review authentication timeline for jsmith in Splunk (index=trustops).
Validate whether jsmith has legitimate travel or vendor activity in Romania.
Consider step-up MFA or temporary account suspension pending analyst verdict.
